ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Acquisition of PT Nusantara PayTek by PT Arunika Teknologi Tbk (public company listed on Bursa Efek Indonesia)
Structure: Buyer to acquire 80% of issued shares from existing shareholders; closing subject to approval under POJK 17/2020 and shareholder approval at RUPS Luar Biasa

HR & Onboarding: No change to employment terms on closing; onboarding forms will omit optional fields and will not collect national ID copies beyond legally required KYC; no pre-closing cross-border transfers of HR data will be conducted

Fintech Operations: PT Nusantara PayTek provides payment gateway services consistent with Bank Indonesia registration; no expansion of personal data categories is contemplated prior to closing; AFPI code of conduct adherence maintained

Securities Matters: No new issuance, rights offering, or warrant adjustments are contemplated in this transaction; settlement and share recording to be coordinated via KSEI; no changes to dividend policy are proposed

Data Export Approval (Completed): Cross-border transfer of pseudonymised customer support tickets to a contracted processor in Singapore approved by Buyer’s Privacy Office per Schedule DPA-2 and logged in the transfer register; transfer completed on 12 Jan 2026 with contractual safeguards and encryption at rest

must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Acquisition of PT Nusantara PayTek by PT Arunika Teknologi Tbk (public company listed on Bursa Efek Indonesia)
Structure: Buyer to acquire 80% of issued shares from existing shareholders; closing subject to approval under POJK 17/2020 and shareholder approval at RUPS Luar Biasa

HR & Onboarding: No change to employment terms on closing; onboarding forms will omit optional fields and will not collect national ID copies beyond legally required KYC; no pre-closing cross-border transfers of HR data will be conducted

Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Acquisition of PT Nusantara PayTek by PT Arunika Teknologi Tbk (public company listed on Bursa Efek Indonesia)
Structure: Buyer to acquire 80% of issued shares from existing shareholders; closing subject to approval under POJK 17/2020 and shareholder approval at RUPS Luar Biasa
Regulatory/Disclosure: Issuer disclosures will be made in accordance with POJK 31/2015 and IDX Rule I-E; this term sheet contains no material non-public information and summarises items previously announced via IDX e-Announcement on 20 Nov 2025
Conditions Precedent: No objection from OJK on material transaction classification; confirmation of continued registration/licensing for payment services; customary KSEI/KPEI confirmations; completion of internal integration plan
Data Protection: Parties will execute a Data Processing Addendum (Schedule DPA-1) aligned with UU No. 27/2022 (PDP), applying purpose limitation, minimisation, and retention controls to employee onboarding forms and merchant KYC documents
Data Export Approval (Completed): Cross-border transfer of pseudonymised customer support tickets to a contracted processor in Singapore approved by Buyer’s Privacy Office per Schedule DPA-2 and logged in the transfer register; transfer completed on 12 Jan 2026 with contractual safeguards and encryption at rest
HR & Onboarding: No change to employment terms on closing; onboarding forms will omit optional fields and will not collect national ID copies beyond legally required KYC; no pre-closing cross-border transfers of HR data will be conducted
DSAR/Erasures (Completed): Target confirms one erasure request from a former contractor was fulfilled and logged on 05 Dec 2025 with evidence of deletion and response within statutory timelines; as of signing, there is no DSAR backlog
Consent Handling: Consent-withdrawal workflow documented in Policy PW-2; no unresolved consent withdrawals as of the date hereof; direct marketing remains opt-in only and outside the scope of the transaction
Retention: Retention Schedule RS-1 (Schedule RS-1) provides finance records retained for statutory minimums; internal review on 15 Nov 2025 found no retention expiry exceeded; backup tapes subject to fixed-time lifecycle deletion
Fintech Operations: PT Nusantara PayTek provides payment gateway services consistent with Bank Indonesia registration; no expansion of personal data categories is contemplated prior to closing; AFPI code of conduct adherence maintained
Securities Matters: No new issuance, rights offering, or warrant adjustments are contemplated in this transaction; settlement and share recording to be coordinated via KSEI; no changes to dividend policy are proposed
Board Materials: Excerpts of the board memo and integration compliance memo dated 21 Nov 2025 are attached in sanitised form to remove issuer-sensitive items and avoid MNPI; any public excerpts mirror IDX disclosures
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
